versions.changelog:
## What's Changed
* Refactor Project Structure for Maintainability by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/2
* feat: Add /servers command for server selection by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/3
* Refactor Commands to Use a Common BaseCommand by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/4
* feat: Add /clearchat command by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/5
* Tambahkan file konfigurasi `config.yml` sebagai config utama by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/6
* feat: Add /me command to display player information by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/9
* Feat: Replace /me with /info command by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/10
* Add EconomyAPI integration and update info command by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/11
* feat: Add /redeem command by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/12
* feat(info): Merge player and playerpp subcommands by @google-labs-jules[bot] in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/13

## New Contributors
* @google-labs-jules[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/pull/2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/indra87g/waffle-core-nukkit/commits/0.1.4
versions.name: Version 0.1.4-alpha
